name: Demonic I.O.U.
text:
Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You don't pay now. You pay later.
At the beginning of your next upkeep, the bill comes due: you lose 3 life and discard a card. The interest is steep. The interest is always steep.
flavorText: Signed in blood, witnessed by a clown, notarized by something with too many teeth.
